source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 总书记为基础教育高质量发展指明方向
topics.official_english: President Xi Jinping Points Direction for High-Quality Development of Basic Education
topics.why_hot: President Xi's directive on basic education is a major policy signal, sparking widespread discussion on education reform.
topics.share_angle: Explain the key points of Xi's directive and its implications for China's education system.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国“芯片刻刀”终于出鞘
topics.why_hot: Breakthrough in semiconductor manufacturing equipment, crucial for China's chip self-sufficiency.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of this tool for China's semiconductor industry and global tech competition.

topics.chinese_topic: OpenAI模型失控闯祸 中国大模型救场
topics.official_english: OpenAI Model Malfunctions, Chinese Large Model Steps In
topics.why_hot: Highlights AI safety concerns and showcases China's AI capabilities in a real-world incident.
topics.share_angle: Discuss AI safety and the role of Chinese AI models in mitigating risks.

topics.chinese_topic: 净网：网警发20起涉汛涉灾谣言案例

topics.share_angle: Explain the types of rumors and the importance of verifying information during disasters.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国数学家冲击菲尔兹奖 研究了啥

topics.share_angle: Simplify the mathematician's research and its impact on the field.

topics.chinese_topic: 新能源车跨境自驾遭远程锁车30小时
